scoping.selected_writer_rationale: etl.usp_load_dim_product is the sole direct writer to dbo.Dim_Product, implementing SCD Type 2 via a two-phase UPDATE+INSERT pattern. All four other procedures that reference Dim_Product (usp_load_fact_ap_invoice, usp_load_fact_inventory_receipt, usp_load_fact_po, usp_load_fact_requisition) are read-only consumers joining on Product_BK/IsCurrent.

classification.rationale: The writer proc implements a two-phase expire+reinsert pattern: Phase 1 sets IsCurrent=0 and EffectiveEnd=today-1 for hash-changed rows; Phase 2 inserts new versions with IsCurrent=1 and EffectiveEnd='9999-12-31'. Column shape confirms SCD2: EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent, and a surrogate PK alongside a separate business key Product_BK.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares PK_Dim_Product on Product_SK, and auto_increment_columns confirms Product_SK is an identity column — a definitive surrogate key signal.

natural_key.rationale: Product_BK is used as the match column in both proc phases: the expire UPDATE joins on dw.Product_BK = src.ItemCode, and the insert NOT EXISTS guard filters on dw.Product_BK = src.ItemCode, establishing it as the business key.

watermark.rationale: The proc performs a full-scan load each run with no date-based WHERE filter on the source. Change detection is hash-based (SourceRowHash). DW_InsertDate is a DW metadata column, not a source modification watermark. This translates to a dbt snapshot with check strategy.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT src.ItemCode AS Product_BK, src.ItemName AS ProductName, ISNULL(src.Description, '') AS Description, src.UnitOfMeasure AS UnitOfMeasure, src.ItemCategory AS Category, src.AccountingType AS AccountingType, ISNULL(src.GLAccount, '00000') AS GLAccount, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, CAST(1 AS BIT) AS IsCurrent, CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME2) AS DW_InsertDate, HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.ItemName, ISNULL(src.Description, ''), src.UnitOfMeasure, src.ItemCategory, src.AccountingType, ISNULL(src.GLAccount, ''))) AS SourceRowHash FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Items] src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[Dim_Product] dw WHERE dw.Product_BK = src.ItemCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 );
refactor.refactored_sql: -- ============================================================================= -- Refactored SELECT for etl.usp_Load_Dim_Product (Phase 2 – new versions) -- Pattern: import / logical / final CTEs -- Source procedure: etl.usp_Load_Dim_Product -- ============================================================================= WITH -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- IMPORT: raw source rows -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- source_items AS ( SELECT ItemCode, ItemName, Description, UnitOfMeasure, ItemCategory, AccountingType, GLAccount FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Items] ), -- IMPORT: currently active dimension rows (IsCurrent = 1) current_products AS ( SELECT Product_BK FROM [dbo].[Dim_Product] WHERE IsCurrent = 1 ), -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- LOGICAL: items that have no current version in the dimension (net-new or -- re-versioned after SCD2 expiry). Reproduces the NOT EXISTS filter. -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- net_new_items AS ( SELECT src.ItemCode, src.ItemName, src.Description, src.UnitOfMeasure, src.ItemCategory, src.AccountingType, src.GLAccount FROM source_items src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM current_products cp WHERE cp.Product_BK = src.ItemCode ) ), -- LOGICAL: compute the row hash for each net-new item. -- NOTE: hash uses ISNULL(GLAccount,'') (empty string) per the -- original procedure; the stored GLAccount column uses -- ISNULL(GLAccount,'00000') — these are intentionally different. hashed_items AS ( SELECT ItemCode, ItemName, Description, UnitOfMeasure, ItemCategory, AccountingType, GLAccount, HASHBYTES( 'SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', ItemName, ISNULL(Description, ''), UnitOfMeasure, ItemCategory, AccountingType, ISNULL(GLAccount, '')) ) AS SourceRowHash FROM net_new_items ), -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- FINAL: assemble the full output column list matching [dbo].[Dim_Product] -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------- final AS ( SELECT CAST(ItemCode AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Product_BK, CAST(ItemName AS NVARCHAR(200)) AS ProductName, CAST(ISNULL(Description, '') AS NVARCHAR(500)) AS Description, CAST(UnitOfMeasure AS VARCHAR(20)) AS UnitOfMeasure, CAST(ItemCategory AS VARCHAR(30)) AS Category, CAST(AccountingType AS VARCHAR(20)) AS AccountingType, CAST(ISNULL(GLAccount, '00000') AS VARCHAR(20)) AS GLAccount, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, CAST(1 AS BIT) AS IsCurrent, CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME2) AS DW_InsertDate, SourceRowHash FROM hashed_items ) SELECT * FROM final;
